title: Plushie Beds: Cute Cow & Bear Beds
description:

cottage core aesthetic bear teddy bear cow plush stuffed animal kawaii plushie cow highland calf fuzzy cosy cute autumn decoration highland cow cherry mob
body:
# Plushy Beds: Barry the Cow ### Cute Plushy Bed Resource Pack ![MrBlueberry & Barry The Cow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17287ddfa393e91f85c0ce954d136c6be1a7ff4c_0.webp) Adds **Barry**, a sweet little Highland cow plushie with fuzzy hair, tiny horns, and a cozy smile, sitting right on your **orange bed** in Minecraft. Also adds **MrBlueberry**, a blueberry-blue teddy bear plushie chilling on your **light blue bed**. Make your world feel warmer, softer, and a little more huggable ( ´ ꒳ ` )ノ --- # Why You’ll Love BarryBeds ![Barry Throwing Cake](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a036e62ca6e94e6d25f65e26981cd158707b43c_0.webp) - Makes your Minecraft builds **cuter & cozier** - Works in **Survival**: - craft an **orange bed** to meet **Barry** - craft a **light blue bed** to meet **MrBlueberry** - **Both plushies** are also **inventory items** you can carry & hold like plushies - Enjoy late-night vibes with milk & cookies by your plushie pals - Lightweight, easy to install, shader-friendly - Perfect for cottagecore bases and anyone who loves cows **and** bears 🐮🐻 ---
How to Get Them - Craft an **orange bed** → **Barry** appears and keeps you company ✨ - Craft a **light blue bed** → **MrBlueberry** pops in with blueberry vibes 🫐 - Both also show up as plushie **inventory items** and can be held before placing.

--- ## Plushie Lore Barry was inspired by my girlfriend’s favorite plushies (*≧▽≦) Now **Barry & MrBlueberry** are the first duo in the series—more friends coming soon!
A cozy corner 📦🧸
--- ## Support Future Plushies If you’d like to see **more plushie friends** (or even plushie-style mobs), you can support me here: [PayPal](https://paypal.me/TSFvideo?country.x=CH&locale.x=en_US) - Thanks for supporting **Barry & MrBlueberry**! - Helps me add more plushies! - Fuels bigger projects (like full plushie mobs ✨) ---
Requirements & Compatibility This pack works with vanilla despite changing entity models thanks to [Ewan Howells Template](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/template-remodellable-beds)
---
Tools Used for Screenshots - Shaders: [Rethinking Voxels](https://modrinth.com/shader/rethinking-voxels) - Resource Packs: [F8thful](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/f8thful), [Rabbit Villagers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rabbit-villagers) - 3D Modeling: [Blender](https://www.blender.org/)
--- ▸ Keywords: Minecraft plushie bed, cow plushie, **blue bear plushie**, Barry, **MrBlueberry**, orange bed, **light blue bed**, cute pack, cozy builds, survival resource pack, plushie item, **Highland cow plushie**, **teddy bear plushie**, **blueberry bear**, **bear plushie Minecraft**.
